programmes.show_description: Plot Heavy: When Stan sells off the coveted family plot, the Smiths open their own cemetery in their backyard with the help of a basketball Hall of Famer.
Lumberjerk: US animated comedy series. Stan is forced to partner with Jeff in a lumberjack competition, and Steve, Francine and Snot enter a contest to win a vintage pick-up truck.
The Patron: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. Grumio falls ill - but Marcus refuses to pay for his medical treatment - and a rich nobleman agrees to fund Stylax's charioteering career.
Kez joins Stephen Mulhern hoping to be the one to go all the way to win a life-changing 100,000 pounds - all she needs to do is beat the Banker and his mind games.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Birthday Grifts / Vintage Porkys / Tub-o-War: Animated series. Elmer Fudd throws a birthday party, Porky Pig goes old school, and Marvin the Martian tries to give his dog a bath.
Oregon Fail / Duck Call / Life's a Beach: Animated series. Yosemite Sam has wagon woes, Elmer Fudd upgrades his duck-calling plan, and a family of bears enjoy a day at the beach.
Animated series based on the DC Comics superhero team. Robin forms a book club to debut his new autobiography, but the Titans would rather discuss other books.
Some Fred Time: Animated adventure series. An overworked Fred takes some time off from mysteries at Daphne's family's beach house - unfortunately, a walking shark then attacks!
There Wolf: Animated adventure series. The gang rushes Scooby to an animal hospital when he suddenly falls ill, but things go from bad to worse when a werewolf goes on the rampage.
Three guys in Manchester hope to win the affections of vintage clothes fan Tanya.

programmes.show_name: Billie and Greg: The Family Diaries
programmes.show_description: Reality series. The Shepherds head off on a staycation for some quality family time, and Greg and Chatty's health journey gets serious when they find some medical issues.
Reality series. Love is blossoming as the Essex couples go from strength to strength. Elma and Sammy enjoy a double date with Roman and Matilda and Dan and Ella take the next step.
Havana Nights: US reality series. Alexia moves into her new apartment, Guerdy prepares for chemotherapy, and Adriana hosts a release party for her new song with Emilio Estefan.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Venom in the Viper Room: US reality series. Love is in the air for Boz and her new boyfriend as the women rock the Viper Room for the release of Erika's single.
Ant and Dec try to help husband-and-wife team Dan and Sarah - then married couple Nik and Khajal - climb as high up the never-ending money ladder as they can.
Graham Norton invites nurse Chris, HR advisor Laura, and school administrator Samantha to spin the Wheel, solve puzzles and avoid bankrupts for a possible 50,000 pounds.
Reality series. It's all about get-togethers as Billy and Amy host a barbecue, Courtney has a garden party and Livvy celebrates Darling's birthday with a dog party.
Hoedown to Showdown: Reality series. Joe and Seema plan a surprise hoedown for Nicole, but Lauren and Paige's bust-up could make for a wild western evening.
Reunion Part One: US reality series. The Miami ladies reunite in dramatic fashion - and fashions - in New York City as Kiki confronts Larsa about her behaviour since dating Marcus.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: What the Chuck?: US reality series. The fangs are out at the Viper Room as tensions run high between Kyle and Dorit, and Sutton and Garcelle plan a cheesy surprise.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Mo Gilligan, Naga Munchetty, and Joanna Page all trying to 'say what they see' in aid of charity.
Graham Norton hosts as accountant John, primary school teacher Jess, and care home assistant Paris all get spinning the wheel to try to take home a massive 50,000 pounds.
More life-changing money is on offer as Ant and Dec introduce NHS matrons Karis and Tim - then husband-and-wife team Arj and Charlotte - to the Limitless Ladder.
Have you ever wondered how clever you are? This is your chance to find out as Lee Mack is back with the first episode of the third series of the ultimate leveller of a quiz show.
Tales of Former Sports Glory: Peter, Quagmire and Cleveland tell each other a number of tall stories about their youthful athletic accomplishments.
One If by Clam, Two If by Sea: Subversive animated comedy. When a hurricane destroys Quahog, The Drunken Clam is rebuilt by a Brit who turns it into an English pub.
Peterminator: Stewie sets out to design a robot to kill Lois, but his plan backfires, launching him and Brian into a futuristic adventure.
Guardian: US animated comedy series. Stan accidentally liberates a secret CIA AI system which proceeds to go rogue and attempt to destroy humanity with nuclear weapons.
Stan and Francine and Stan and Francine and Radika: US animated comedy series. Stan and Francine go back in time to settle an argument.
Mother Author Laser Pointer: Animated comedy. Linda's anxieties over the children growing up cause her to obsessively harass a famous children's book author to the point of terror.
Gift Card or Buy Trying: Animated comedy. The family decide to split a gift card five ways but have trouble settling on purchases, and Gene tries to avoid a former friend.
The Candidate: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. Elections see Marcus and Stylax signing up as hired clappers for a wig-wearing politician and Grumio being drawn to a rival's plums.
Join Stephen Mulhern for the game show with only one question and find out if Jovan can open the right boxes in the right order to be left with 100,000 pounds.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Pearl of My Dreams / Down the Drain / Mech-A-Mess: Animated series. Porky Pig and Daffy Duck dive for pearls, Elmer Fudd has a hunting mishap, and Wile E. Coyote gets a new suit.
Boarding Games / Paintings / Winter Hungerland: Animated series. A kitten goes to doggy daycare, Porky Pig's pet paints a picture, and Wolf gets hungry in a winter wonderland.
Animated series based on the DC Comics superhero team. After winning a huge cash prize, the Titans learn about the Internal Revenue Service (IRS) and taxes.
Renn Scare: Animated adventure series. The gang heads to Velma's beloved authentic Renaissance Faire and must find a way to infiltrate the royal feast to stop an evil court jester.
How to Train Your Coward: Animated adventure series. Finally fed up with monsters and mayhem, Shaggy and Scooby decide to quit the gang and train their replacements on the job.
Youtuber Zac is in Manchester hoping to find his dream Northern Gent. Will any of the three guys impress with their style choices?

programmes.show_name: Billie and Greg: The Family Diaries
programmes.show_description: Reality series. Nelly and Arthur go back to school, giving Greg time to focus on his and Chatty's medical issues as Billie has her own health concerns and a mummy MOT.
Reality series. It's all about get-togethers as Billy and Amy host a barbecue, Courtney has a garden party and Livvy celebrates Darling's birthday with a dog party.
Reunion Part One: US reality series. The Miami ladies reunite in dramatic fashion - and fashions - in New York City as Kiki confronts Larsa about her behaviour since dating Marcus.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: What the Chuck?: US reality series. The fangs are out at the Viper Room as tensions run high between Kyle and Dorit, and Sutton and Garcelle plan a cheesy surprise.
More life-changing money is on offer as Ant and Dec introduce NHS matrons Karis and Tim - then husband-and-wife team Arj and Charlotte - to the Limitless Ladder.
Graham Norton invites novelty shop owner Jess, learning and development trainer Xhemal, and former GP Pip to hold their nerve and spin the Wheel to win a possible 50,000 pounds.
Reality series. The gang celebrate Jordan's 30th birthday with a Moulin Rouge themed party. However, not everyone is in the mood to celebrate.
The Reunion: Reality series following a group of Cheshire residents. The Housewives join Brian Dowling on the sofa to discuss the highlights of Series 17.
Reunion Part Two: US reality series. Alexia and Larsa's backstage row escalates, Lisa is sickened when the group doesn't show her sympathy, and Nicole discusses her father's passing.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: A Perfect Storm Out: US reality series. Bozoma hosts a healing spa day for the ladies, but it is anything but serene when Sutton objects to a stormy escape by Kyle.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Gemma Atkinson, Karen Hauer, and Josh Widdicombe all trying to 'say what they see' in aid of charity.
Graham Norton invites nurse Chris, HR advisor Laura, and school administrator Samantha to spin the Wheel, solve puzzles and avoid bankrupts for a possible 50,000 pounds.
Married couple Arj and Charlotte are back to continue their game before the turn of best friends from Northern Ireland Phil and Arainn sees them play a thrilling game.
The 2,000-Year-Old-Virgin: Animated comedy. Peter and the guys set out to throw Jesus the best birthday party ever to help him lose his virginity.
Bookie of the Year: Animated comedy. Chris's baseball skills prove lucrative. In a show dedicated to his memory, Frank Sinatra Jr opens an Italian restaurant with Stewie and Brian.
The Marrying Kind: Stewie experiences domestic life after ordering a mail order bride. Plus, Peter and Chris become addicted to hotel breakfasts.
Customer of the Week: Lois finds solace at the local coffee shop - however, upon realising they have a Customer of the Week contest, she goes to extreme lengths to win.
Who's Brian Now?: Brian finds himself at an animal shelter, and his microchip reveals he had a family before the Griffins, who he discovers are well off and well educated.
The Sinister Fate!!: US animated comedy series. A new friendship causes Hayley to start to worry about her future, and Steve and his friends try out for Roger's improv troupe.
